title_of_original: State Aid SA.38330 (2016/FC) – Poland Alleged unlawful regional investment aid to PCC MCAA sp. Zo.o (PCC)
case_description: [1] On the 10th of May 2015 the Portuguese Ministry of Economy awarded a direct grant to XCA Lda (hereinafter XCA) in the amount of 15983927.91 €, [2] for an initial investment into a new facility for manufacturing high-purity monochloroacetic acid in Sines, in Alentejo. [3] The eligible costs of this investment project were around 54012345 €. [4] The grant was financed through the general budget of the state.
